---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup + data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)


turnout_all <- readRDS("~/Desktop/final-project-Smlfberry/data/turnout_all.rds")

state_avg <- turnout_all |>
  group_by(state) |>
  summarise(avg_turnout = mean(turnout_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
   arrange(desc(avg_turnout))

```

```{r bar plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

state_avg <- turnout_all %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarise(avg_turnout = mean(turnout_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_turnout)) %>%
  mutate(state_full = case_when(
    state == "WI" ~ "Wisconsin",
    state == "MI" ~ "Michigan",
    state == "IL" ~ "Illinois",
    state == "OH" ~ "Ohio",
    state == "IN" ~ "Indiana"
  ))

p <- ggplot(state_avg, aes(x = avg_turnout, y = reorder(state_full, avg_turnout), 
                            fill = avg_turnout,
                            text = paste0(state_full, "<br>Average Turnout: ", scales::percent(avg_turnout, accuracy = 0.1)))) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#c8e0f0", high = "#1a3a5c") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11)
  )

ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = "Average Turnout by State<br><sup>Votes Cast by Citizen, Voting Age Population for the 2024 General Presidential Election</sup>",
      font = list(size = 20, family = "Georgia, serif", color = "#1a1916"),
      x = 0,
      xanchor = "left",
      pad = list(b = 10)
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(family = "Georgia, serif", size = 13, color = "#1a1916")
    ),
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(family = "Georgia, serif", size = 11, color = "#6b6860")
    ),
    margin = list(t = 80)
  )

```
